$comment: A3 decision = NEEDS_CLARIFICATION. Real trace from Phase 1: user asked 'top traffic sources'. Two material ambiguities (which metric, which dimension). A3 bundles into one round; auto-fillable items (date_range, ranking_limit) go to halted_state.preapplied_defaults_pending and are disclosed in rationale. Validates against ../agents/a3-decision.schema.json.

clarification.question: Quick check before I pull this — what should 'traffic' mean, and what kind of 'sources' did you want?

options.label: Total users
options.hint: all unique users in the period (engaged or not)

options.label: Channel Group
options.hint: GA4 channel bucket like 'Organic Social', 'Paid Search'

clarification.rationale: I'll use the last 28 days and top 10 by default. The metric and dimension need your call because the ranking can come out very differently depending on which you pick.

a1_intent.$comment: Full A1 record from intent.example.json, embedded verbatim so resume can re-enter at A3 without re-running A1.

a2_plan.$comment: Full A2 record from query-plan.example.json, embedded verbatim so A3 can validate user picks against the candidate set.

preapplied_defaults_pending.rationale: no time scope specified; GA4 28-day window is conventional
no limit specified; top 10 is conventional for ranked tables
